depth_profile.claim_boundary: PhysicsGuard owns the family baseline semantics and every target-local current-model purpose, failure, native oracle, proof, residual risk, and bounded claim. SkillGuard only executes and reconciles the declared family baseline inventory; that receipt cannot close a current model.

claim_boundary: A pass licenses only the exact low-fidelity model, dataset identities, mappings, sampled universe, operating envelope, semantics, and claim scope in the receipt.

action.summary: Validate the immutable PhysicsGuard family baseline contract; this is not current-model purpose authority.
Admit only the family baseline candidate bound to its exact baseline contract and ordered authoring chain.
Execute the mandatory family baseline known-good proof.
Prove the maintained family baseline blocks its declared regression case: Validation identity is wrong.
Prove the maintained family baseline blocks its declared regression case: Coverage universe is shallow.
Prove the maintained family baseline blocks its declared regression case: Physical relation or envelope is violated.
Prove the maintained family baseline blocks its declared regression case: Prediction semantics are overclaimed.
Prove the maintained family baseline blocks its declared regression case: Validation scope is overreached.
